testcase.name: generatesExpectedDtoFiles
testcase.system-out: 10:13:52.614 [main] INFO com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.OpenApiGeneratorService -- Generating code from OpenAPI spec: file:/home/runner/work/library-base/library-base/starters/starter-openapi/target/test-classes/petstore.yaml 10:13:52.895 [main] INFO com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.OpenApiGeneratorService -- OpenAPI generation complete: 2 DTO(s), 1 controller(s) written to /tmp/junit660153783676264022

testcase.name: generatesControllerFile
testcase.system-out: 10:13:52.919 [main] INFO com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.OpenApiGeneratorService -- Generating code from OpenAPI spec: file:/home/runner/work/library-base/library-base/starters/starter-openapi/target/test-classes/petstore.yaml 10:13:52.932 [main] INFO com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.OpenApiGeneratorService -- OpenAPI generation complete: 2 DTO(s), 1 controller(s) written to /tmp/junit16259456343834906149

testcase.name: controllerHasCorrectContent
testcase.system-out: 10:13:52.937 [main] INFO com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.OpenApiGeneratorService -- Generating code from OpenAPI spec: file:/home/runner/work/library-base/library-base/starters/starter-openapi/target/test-classes/petstore.yaml 10:13:52.950 [main] INFO com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.OpenApiGeneratorService -- OpenAPI generation complete: 2 DTO(s), 1 controller(s) written to /tmp/junit6352331782580080000

testcase.name: petDtoHasCorrectContent
testcase.system-out: 10:13:52.957 [main] INFO com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.OpenApiGeneratorService -- Generating code from OpenAPI spec: file:/home/runner/work/library-base/library-base/starters/starter-openapi/target/test-classes/petstore.yaml 10:13:52.969 [main] INFO com.github.juanfranciscofernandezherreros.library.openapi.generator.OpenApiGeneratorService -- OpenAPI generation complete: 2 DTO(s), 1 controller(s) written to /tmp/junit2282239708325787639

testcase.name: throwsWhenSpecCannotBeParsed
